====Pokémon Evolutions====
[[File:Calem Evolutions.png|thumb|250px|Calem in [[Pokémon Evolutions]]]]
Calem appeared in ''[[PE03|The Visionary]]'', where he defeated [[Lysandre]] at the [[Team Flare Secret HQ]]. When Lysandre started firing the [[ultimate weapon]], Calem escaped the blast with {{ga|Serena}} and [[Shauna]]. Afterwards, they witnessed how the ultimate weapon sunk back into the ground.
